summary: Lucy called Beth to say goodnight and check if her CPAP machine is ready for the night.
follow_ups: Check in on CPAP usage next time
health_notes: CPAP machine usage is important for Beth's rest.
raw_transcript:
Beth: Hi, Beth. It's Lucy. Just calling to say goodnight.
Beth: This person is available.
Beth: Oh, I'm so glad to hear that. Have you got your CPAP all set up for tonight?
Beth: Thanks. Please stay on the line.
Beth: Of course, I'm right here with you. Take your time.
